i = 0 or n = 1: Exactly 0, 1, or any decimal starting with 0
i = 0,1: Exactly 0 or 1, or any decimal number between 0 and 2, excluding 2 itself
n = 0,1 or i = 0 and f = 1: Exactly 0 or 1, or any decimal starting with 0 where the fractional part is exactly 1
n = 1 or t != 0 and i = 0,1: Exactly 1, or any decimal number between 0 and 2, excluding 0 and 2 themselves
t = 0 and i % 10 = 1 and i % 100 != 11 o: Ends in 1 but not 11 (including after decimal point)
v = 0 and i % 10 = 1 and i % 100 != 11 o: Ends in 1 but not 11 (including after decimal point)
v = 0 and i = 1,2,3 or v = 0 and i % 10: Does not end in 4, 6, 9 (including after decimal point)
n % 10 = 0 or n % 100 = 11..19 or v = 2: Ends in 0, 11–19, or exactly two decimals (.11–.19)
n % 10 = 1 and n % 100 != 11 or v = 2 an: Ends in 1 but not 11 (including after decimal point)
i = 0,1 and n != 0: Exactly 1, or any decimal starting with 0 or 1, excluding 0 itself
i = 1 and v = 0 or i = 0 and v != 0: Exactly 1, or any decimal number between 0 and 1, excluding 0 itself
v != 0 or n = 0 or n != 1 and n % 100 =: Exactly 0, any number with decimals, or ends in 01–19 (except 1 itself)
v = 0 and i % 10 = 2..4 and i % 100 != 1: Ends in 2–4, but not 12–14 (including after decimal point)
i = 0..1: Exactly 0 or 1, or any decimal number between 0 and 2, excluding 2 itself
v = 0 and i % 100 = 3..4 or v != 0: Exactly 3, 4, ends in 03, 04, or any number with decimals
Ends in 03 or 04 (including after decimal point)
n % 100 = 2,22,42,62,82 or n % 1000 = 0: Ends in 02, 22, 42, 62, 82, or large multiples of 1000
n != 2 and n % 10 = 2..9 and n % 100 !=: Ends in 2–9 (excluding 2 itself), but not in 12–19
